summary: Iteration 171 - Frontend testing for 4 Member Dashboard bug fixes. All fixes verified through code review and API testing. Dashboard page crashes Playwright due to heavy content (known issue), but code review confirms all fixes are properly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard page is memory-intensive and crashes Playwright - consider further optimization or lazy loading improvements

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - Playwright crashes on dashboard

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard crashes Playwright due to heavy content. Use code review or manual browser testing for dashboard features. All 4 bug fixes verified through code review.

login_flow.details: Login API works with credentials dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Returns valid JWT token and user data.

documents_tab_desktop.details: Documents tab present in desktop navigation at MemberDashboard.jsx line 873-875. TabsTrigger with value='documents' and Shield icon.

documents_tab_mobile.details: Documents tab present in mobile navigation at MemberDashboard.jsx line 906-908. Shows as 'Docs' with Shield icon.

documents_tab_content.details: TabsContent for documents at MemberDashboard.jsx line 977-985. Renders DocumentsTab component with pets, token, and API_URL props.

pet_selector_dropdown.details: Pet selector implemented in OverviewTab.jsx line 50-71. Shows when pets.length > 1. User has 5 pets (Mojo, Lola, Mystique, Luna, Buddy).

my_requests_cards_clickable.details: Request cards in OverviewTab.jsx line 129-162 have onClick={() => onTabChange?.('requests')} handler. Cards have cursor-pointer class and hover effects.

browse_recommendations_button.details: MiraPicksCard.jsx line 263-270 has 'Browse All Recommendations' button with onClick={() => window.location.href = '/shop'}.

view_all_recommendations_button.details: SmartRecommendationsCard.jsx line 185-193 has 'View All Recommendations' button with onClick={() => window.location.href = '/shop'}.

shop_page.details: Shop page loads correctly at /shop with 615 products and pillar filters.

documents_api.details: /api/paperwork/documents/{pet_id} returns documents correctly. User has 1 document (Vaccination Record 2026).

mira_requests_api.details: /api/mira/my-requests returns user's requests correctly. Multiple travel and advisory requests found.

pets_api.details: /api/pets/my-pets returns 5 pets for the user with birth_date and gotcha_date fields.

bug_1_requests_not_clickable.fix: Request cards have onClick handler that calls onTabChange('requests') to navigate to requests tab

bug_2_no_pet_switcher.fix: Pet selector dropdown shows when user has multiple pets (pets.length > 1)

bug_4_missing_documents_tab.fix: Documents tab added to both desktop and mobile navigation with proper TabsContent

dashboard_crashes_playwright.description: Dashboard page is memory-intensive and crashes Playwright during screenshot. This is a known issue mentioned in previous test reports.
dashboard_crashes_playwright.workaround: Use code review or manual browser testing for dashboard features
